content.title: AuthNote - User Authentication Note Management System
content.description: AuthNote is a web-based note management application built with Flask that provides user authentication and personalized note storage. The application allows users to create secure accounts, log in, and manage their personal notes with full CRUD operations. It solves the problem of note organization by providing a simple, secure platform where each user's notes are isolated and protected through authentication.
content.role: I developed a complete full-stack web application implementing user authentication, database modeling, and note management functionality. I designed and built the Flask application architecture using blueprints for modular organization, implemented SQLAlchemy models for user and note data persistence, created secure password hashing with Werkzeug, and developed responsive frontend templates using Bootstrap. I also integrated Flask-Login for session management and implemented AJAX functionality for dynamic note deletion.

achievements: Successfully implemented a secure authentication system with password hashing and session management
Created a scalable note management system with user data isolation
Developed responsive web interface compatible across devices
Established proper database relationships between users and their notes
Implemented client-side validation and server-side error handling
technologies: Flask web framework and Blueprint architecture

screenshots: Main dashboard showing user notes interface
Database schema diagram showing User-Note relationships
Note creation and deletion workflow demonstration
